steps.title: Apply triangle inequality for upper bound
steps.content:
The sum of the two known sides must exceed the third side:
$$5 + 9 > x$$
which simplifies to:
$$x < 14$$

steps.title: Apply triangle inequality for lower bound and combine
steps.content:
The difference of the two known sides must be less than the third side:
$$|5 - 9| < x$$
which gives:
$$4 < x$$
Combining with the upper bound:
$$4 < x < 14$$
This matches the description of choice C.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
